name: Luxury Velvet
tagline: Deep-tufted silhouettes in rich, hand-dyed velvet.
story: A family-run Milanese workshop hand-tufts each piece in this collection using Italian velvet and kiln-dried hardwood frames — built to last generations.

name: Japandi Serenity
story: Low profiles, rounded edges, and natural ash. Every piece in Japandi Serenity is built to center a room without overwhelming it.

name: Atelier Stone
story: Sourced from quarries operating water-recycling systems, our stone pieces are sealed to resist stains and built to become heirlooms.

name: Golden Hour
tagline: Brass, linen, and warm ambient light.
story: Inspired by the last hour of daylight — our lighting collection combines brushed brass, linen shades, and dimmable warm bulbs to make every room feel like 6pm in June.

name: Studio Work
tagline: Ergonomic workspaces that put your body first.
story: BIFMA-certified office chairs, height-adjustable desks, and cable-managed storage — engineered for creative professionals who spend hours at the desk.

name: Terra Weave
tagline: Hand-woven rattan, teak, and natural craft.
story: Small-batch craft by artisan cooperatives in Bali. Naturally renewable materials, hand-tools, and techniques passed down through generations.
